text:
Thanks, 

(In reply to Muhammad Moinur Rahman from comment #3)

+1 to 'tentative'.

Narrowing of the table in comment 2 was partly to accommodate 15.x, only if re@ intends to add the column before the end of the year (i.e. before stable/12 reaches end of life).

I'm aware of <https://github.com/bsdjhb/devsummit/blob/main/15.0/planning.md#%EF%B8%8F-axe-candidates-> axe candidates.
